title: Striker (disambiguation)
content:
'''Striker''' could refer to:
[[File:TIEStriker-TFOWM.png|thumb|right|300px|A TIE Striker]]
===Canon===
*The [[Grievance Striker]], General [[Grievous]]' personal blaster
*The [[TIE/sk x1 experimental air superiority fighter]], also called the TIE Striker

===Legends===
*[[Striker (Imperial-class)|''Striker'']], an Imperial Star Destroyer
*[[Striker (corvette group)|''Striker'']], a group of CR90 corvettes
*[[Striker (clone trooper)|Striker]], a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]]
*An alias for [[Granta Omega]]
*the [[Striker projectile pistol]]
*The [[Grievance Striker/Legends|Grievance Striker]]
*[[Satele Shan]]'s ''Striker''-class variant of the [[Liberator-class starfighter]]

{{Disambig}}
